title: Prehistoric World
description: Live a real prehistoric experience surrounded by impressive and realistic dinosaurs!
body:
[**

**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/prehistoric-world-dinosaurs-adventure) version.** ## Ready to build your Prehistoric Park? You will start your adventure in a world where most of the dinosaurs are already extinct, although, there are still some alive in the world! Beware of the oceans, many dinosaurs have taken refuge there... The goal of the modpack is for you to find fossils, extract the DNA, and use new machinery to bring the extinct dinosaurs back to life, as well as the prehistoric plants! In the quests section you will find a step-by-step guide. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ### _**

**_ If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Prehistoric_World/BH_PW_summary.webp) Prehistoric World is a prehistoric modpack, in which the ultimate goal is to have your own dinosaur park, the decoration is up to you, although there are many ways to have it nicely decorated! Please, make the dinosaurs feel at ease, each one has a favorite habitat... Besides that, you will live a unique experience, discovering a lot of new biomes, dangerous dungeons and enemies, or even animals! Of course, you will also find a lot of new items, and be careful, you won't be alone in the world. 🦖 This modpack adds impressive dinosaurs, fossils and other prehistoric related items! Mods like Unusual Prehistory that will make you enjoy your world like never before. ⚔️ Set your game in the past thanks to Age of Weapons, Medieval Deco, Medieval Music or Medieval Craft, among others. 🐲 Discover new enemies and fight against mythological beings, with the great Ice and Fire. ✔️ Perfectly optimized for any game, and compatible with any shader you want to add, thanks to Xenon, Oculus and other mods. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Prehistoric_World/BH_PW_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Prehistoric_World/BH_PW_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tlWx9npV/images/4ae22b1a3c46c3040ca44549073ec17fbb4dde8c.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tlWx9npV/images/bb32776bd743828bc1dfe39b1426f1a5e999244c.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tlWx9npV/images/92aa6a51c0c416456ba7a596a5069eda8ff917ae.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
